outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to highly positive GEX suppressing large price swings.
outlook.summary: The market is in a highly positive GEX environment (62.5B total), which forces mean-reverting behavior and suppresses volatility. Despite a bearish smirk skew and high Put/Call ratios indicating widespread fear, dealers are heavily long gamma. They will aggressively buy dips and sell rips, pinning the price between key call and put walls. Watch the 7200 level for immediate pinning action.

levels.motivazione: Major Call OI in 0DTE (7994) and Weekly (9606) expirations. Acts as an immediate magnetic ceiling and resistance right at the spot price.

Cluster of critical structural metrics: 0DTE Gamma Flip (7023), Monthly Gamma Flip (6998), and multiple Max Pain levels (7030, 6980). Marks a massive shift in dealer hedging.
Heavy Call OI in 0DTE (7139) and MONTHLY (22666). High positive GEX means dealers will buy underlying aggressively as price approaches this support.
Highest single Call OI in 0DTE (18263). A hard ceiling for the current daily session, heavily defended by market makers.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (7233) and MONTHLY (9309). Acts as a secondary support level reinforcing the Max Pain/Gamma Flip zone.
